ogTitle: Grapetree vs Grasstree Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Grapetree and Grasstree Beach.
heading: Grapetree vs Grasstree Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Grapetree, Queensland and Grasstree Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Grasstree Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Grapetree (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Grapetree or Grasstree Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Grapetree has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Grasstree Beach scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Grapetree scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Grasstree Beach scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Grapetree or Grasstree Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Grasstree Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
